binary_metadata.file_type: Bourne-Again shell script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.description:
wrapper around nmap
This package provides a wrapper around nmap, and distribute scans across
several hosts.
It aggregates / splits address ranges, uses a configuration file where scan
configuration can be adjusted, supports resume.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dscan because ### dscan.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `Distributed scanner [-h] --name NAME {srv,agent,config} ...` as documented upstream for dscan.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dscan with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dscan --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
